sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lei vui pan in hong laam to
Niin phual pan in hong dom to
A sang na lam ka tung to
Lung mawl kei ka nuntakna hong lam to
A zawng khal pen kei bang lel
A lungmawl pen kei bang lel
Na min ading nong lam to
Gual lai ah Sian aw Na minphat ka lo

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong leeng ing ee Sianmang Zeisu
Na zalna leh na ang lim ngai ing ee
Khu va bang hong khawl sak aw

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lai kawi khat zong theilote
Lai pai khat zong nei lo te
Lung mawl genthie mang bang te
Luai nau bang hong muam in hong pantah a
an zong ne thei nai lo te
Puan zong silh thei nai lo te
Gal leh sa bang melma te
Sian in hong itna dam tui hong luan ta

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tun sung khat pan laizom te
Itna melma lung mawl te
Suith lung dawm bang ih tuak diam
Sin lai siangtho va bang pil ding hong siam
Hong leeng aw hong leeng aw
Sianmang Zeisu hong leng aw
Nang kiang lo koi ka pai diam
Na min phat lo maimit ka sing thei diam
